metadata.proxy_note: LiMn2O4 used as ordered proxy for LNMO, same as LiCoO2 proxy for NMC. Dopants substitute at Mn4+ (16d octahedral site).
metadata.description: Dopants at the Mn4+ octahedral (16d) site in LiNi0.5Mn1.5O4 spinel cathode
sources: Zhong et al., J. Electrochem. Soc. 2002 (Co, Cr, Fe, Al, Ti, Cu, Mg survey)
Yi et al., J. Power Sources 2011 review (comprehensive doping survey)
Aravindan et al., Chem. Eur. J. 2015 (Al, Ti, Cr, Fe, Co, Cu, Mg)
Liu et al., Adv. Energy Mater. 2021 (site-specific engineering)
Kim et al., J. Electrochem. Soc. 2019 (Sc-doped LNMO)
Qi et al., J. Power Sources 2022 (Fe-Ti co-doping)

Al.effect: Reduces Mn dissolution, improves high-temperature cycling stability, stabilises spinel framework

Ti.effect: Isovalent with Mn4+, structural stabilisation, common in Al-Ti co-doping studies

Fe.effect: Introduces Mn3+ content, adjusts P4332/Fd-3m ordering ratio, improves electronic conductivity

Co.effect: Controls P4332 (ordered) vs Fd-3m (disordered) polymorph; most widely studied LNMO dopant

Cu.effect: Improves rate capability and electronic conductivity; Cu2+ enhances Ni2+/4+ redox

Mg.effect: Reduces Jahn-Teller active Mn3+ content, improves structural stability

Cr.effect: Improves cycling stability and capacity retention; similar OS to Mn3+
Cr.note: Excluded by Stage 4 viability (Cr6+ formation risk during calcination in O2)

V.effect: Multiple OS in operation (V3+/4+/5+), improves cycling; vanadium doping widely reported

Zn.effect: Some improvement in cycling stability reported; less studied than Co/Cu/Mg

Ga.effect: Structural stabilisation reported; modest electrochemical improvement

Mo.effect: High OS substitution reported; improves Li-ion diffusion in some studies

Zr.effect: Reported to improve structural stability; isovalent with Mn4+

Sc.effect: Induces cation disorder (promotes Fd-3m over P4332); improves rate at cost of ordering
sources: Kim et al. J. Electrochem. Soc. 2019

La.effect: Lanthanum doping improves electrochemical performance in recent studies; likely at grain boundaries or Mn site

Nb.effect: High-valence substitution reported; limited data vs NMC where it is well-established

W.effect: High-valence W6+ substitution; cobalt-free LNMO with W doping reported 2025

summary.note_on_cr: Cr is confirmed_successful but excluded by Stage 4 viability filter (toxic)
summary.host_site: Mn4+ at 16d octahedral in LiMn2O4/LNMO spinel
summary.pipeline_target: Substitute Mn4+ (r=0.530 A octahedral) in LiMn2O4 proxy structure
